channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: NSF invests $83M in integrated data systems to boost AI-driven science and research infrastructure
item.description: The U.S. National Science Foundation announced $83 million in awards through the Integrated Data Systems and Services program to advance AI-driven science.

item.title: NSF statement on advancing AI priorities through the Genesis Mission
item.description: The U.S. National Science Foundation joins the White House Office of Science and Technology Policy and other agencies to advance AI priorities.

item.title: Ancient ferns turned Triassic Europe into a wildfire inferno
item.description: Ancient fern savannahs may have transformed parts of Europe into a wildfire-prone inferno during the end-Triassic mass extinction. New fossil evidence...

item.title: New NSF initiative aims to unlock dataset value for AI-enabled scientific discovery
item.description: The U.S. National Science Foundation announced the NSF Unlocking Dataset Value for AI-Enabled Scientific Discovery program, a new investment to advanc...
